name: Evospace
short_description: Contribute to the colonization of the universe. Get and process resources, develop your technologies. Achieve complete automation and build a portal to include another planet in the chain of worlds.
detailed_description:
Fully Modifiable World

In Evospace, you are free to shape the world however you like. Dig, build, terraform — every block can be moved, and every inch of the world is under your control.

Safe, but Not Easy

There are no enemies or deadly threats — just you and endless possibilities for building. But the path to a highly efficient factory is full of engineering challenges and logistical puzzles.

Deep Automation

Design complex production chains with hundreds of machines and technologies. Manage the flow of items, fluids, electricity, heat, and kinetic energy. Build logic circuits, configure blocks with controllers, create intelligent networks, and integrate everything into one cohesive factory system.

Chemistry, Metallurgy, and Fuel

Master raw material processing — from basic ores to refined metals and advanced alloys. Use chemical processes to produce fuels, acids, solvents, and components for complex recipes. Control production chains with attention to pressure, temperature, and chemical reactions.

Energy: From Coal to Uranium

Choose the right energy sources for your factory — coal burners, bioreactors, solar panels, steam turbines, or nuclear reactors. Proper energy distribution is key to maintaining a stable and efficient system.

Circuits and High-Tech

Progress from mechanical machines to electronics, digital logic, fusion reactors, and teleportation technology. Create microchips, computers, and automated controllers. Unlock increasingly powerful automation tools.

Hundreds of Technologies

Unlock hundreds of technologies through the research tree. New resources, machines, materials, and upgrades will become available step by step as your factory evolves.

supported_languages: English, Russian, German, Spanish - Spain, Portuguese - Brazil, Simplified Chinese, Hungarian, Korean, Polish
